content:
the city of sparkling lights
which i cannot longer enter
locked out in my own head
stuck with my last rites

the door you point out to
nolonger exists
your intentions are nice,
but please stop lying to me

guess ill spend my days
wondering on the outskirts
thinking about how to pass the days

the city of sparkling lights
looks nice from the outside
maybe i no longer need to enter,
is what i tell myself

oh, it's such a shame
for a flower as beautiful as you
to wither away
is it too much to ask
for you to remain by my side?
even if it's selfish to ask
I know it's painful, I know it's tough
but I hope youll still be around
you've sat through so many bad movies
let's stick with this one till it's over
I promise I'll make it a little less boring
